picks.sp_analysis: Pivetta season 2.87 ERA, K/9 9.44, home split 18.0 ERA (SMALL SAMPLE 1 start — unreliable). Houser season 3.31 ERA, away split 3.7 ERA, recent 4.5 ERA. SMALL SAMPLE flags make recent form unreliable, use season stats.

picks.park_note: Petco Park 0.88 runs factor, 0.82 HR — elite pitcher park (+1 NRFI point).
picks.nrfi_analysis: NRFI prob 80.0%, YRFI prob 20.0%. Away SP NRFI score 1.058, Home SP NRFI score 1.284. Both pitchers have elite NRFI profiles. Pivetta K/9 9.44 (above 8.5), BB/9 2.48 (below 3.0). Houser K/9 6.62 (below threshold but still solid), BB/9 2.74 (acceptable). Petco Park factor 0.88 strongly supports NRFI. Model fair price -400 vs typical book -130 creates massive EV edge.
picks.key_edge: NRFI model probability 80% in elite pitcher park — 24% EV vs typical -130 book price.
picks.rationale: NRFI model shows 80% probability with fair price -400. Petco Park's 0.88 runs factor is elite pitcher-friendly environment. Both SPs have strong NRFI scores (1.058 and 1.284). Early season with SMALL SAMPLE flags means season stats are most reliable, and both pitchers have sub-4.00 ERAs. Typical book offers NRFI around -130 for average games, creating 24% EV when our model shows -400 fair value.
picks.avoid_reason: ML odds -400.0 exceed -180 cap — negative EV at this juice
